steps.title: Identify the coefficient
steps.content: In $H=2.517L+22.84$, $H$ is estimated height and $L$ is femur length. The number $2.517$ is the coefficient of $L$.

steps.title: Interpret the rate
steps.content: In a linear model, the coefficient of the input tells how much the output changes for each increase of $1$ in the input. Here, estimated height increases by $2.517$ inches for each $1$-inch increase in femur length. The answer is A.
